title: Hieracium prolixiceps
taxonomy: Hieracium prolixiceps is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification places it in the order Asterales, which includes other flowering plants with similar characteristics. At the genus level, Hieracium prolixiceps is part of the large and diverse genus Hieracium, consisting of over 300 species. Within the genus, Hieracium prolixiceps is further classified as a species of hawkweed, a group of plants known for their yellow or white flowers. The specific classification of Hieracium prolixiceps helps scientists understand its evolutionary relationships and place it within the broader context of plant taxonomy.
